content: 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reframed to store only surprise-scored episodic traces, where curiosity-driven intrinsic reward signals from ICM/RND frameworks act as the dynamic retention threshold. Only memory traces that trigger a high enough intrinsic curiosity bonus are kept long-term for downstream planning, while low-curiosity mundane traces are pruned to avoid memory bloat.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
